Skip to main content

We recently released a new Document Search platform, replacing outdated technology. Moving to the new platform involves migrating a significant number of documents. Thank you for your patience as we work through some technical and functional issues. 

Document search

Sorting

Filter

Agreement Status
Approved × Remove this filter

Approval Date

Approval date

This is the date the agreement was approved. Some of our older agreements do not have data about the approval date. If you cannot find the agreement you are looking for, please try the ‘agreement type’ filter instead.

Nominal Expiry Date

Nominal expiry date

This is the date the agreement is said to expire. Some agreements continue to operate after their nominal expiry date. Some of our older agreements do not have data about the nominal expiry date. If you cannot find the agreement you are looking for, please try the ‘agreement type’ filter instead.

 

Agreement Status

Agreement status

Approved

This category shows enterprise agreements that have been approved under the Fair Work Act 2009 from 1 January 2010 onwards and have not since been terminated, quashed or superseded.

Ceased to operate – pre-2010 agreement

All pre-2010 agreements that were still in operation (‘zombie agreements’) have automatically sunsetted unless an application was made to the Commission before 7 December 2023 and the agreement’s default period has been extended or the application is pending. This category may also include pre-2010 agreements that ceased to operate at an earlier time, for example, because they were replaced by a subsequent agreement.

Pending extension

An application to extend the default period for the ‘zombie agreement’ is currently before the Commission

Extended

The default period for the ‘zombie agreement’ has been extended by the Commission.

Other statuses

If an agreement has been terminated, superseded, quashed, or subject to a title change, the agreement status tag will show that status.

  • (-) Approved (89380)
  • Ceased to operate – pre-2010 agreement (46572)
  • Terminated (12839)
  • Other (1520)
  • Expired (1373)
  • Superseded (906)
  • Title Changed (793)
  • Not Signed (89)
  • Withdrawn (73)
  • Quashed (37)
  • Error (19)
  • Migrated (PSA only) (15)
  • Extended (9)
  • Cancelled (7)
  • Migrated (Work Choices only) (2)
  • Pending Extension (2)
  • Consolidated (2)
  • Set Aside (1)

Agreement Type

Agreement type

Single-enterprise Agreement: An agreement made by an employer or two or more employers that are single interest employers.

Certified Agreement (Single Business): the Australian Industrial Relations Commission certified these until 2006. The Workplace Authority changed or extended these up to 31 December 2009.

Collective Agreement: the Workplace Authority approved these until 2009.

Greenfields Agreement: An agreement for a genuine new enterprise that is new or about to start up and where the employer(s) have not yet hired the people who will work under the agreement.

Multi-enterprise Agreement: An agreement made by two or more employers that are not single interest employers.

Pre-Work Choices Agreement: agreements approved by the Australian Industrial Relations Commission prior to the commencement of the Workplace Relations Amendment (Work Choices) Act 2005.

Preserved State Agreement: state awards that became federal agreements under the Workplace Relations Amendment (Work Choices) Act 2005.

Workplace Determination: A workplace determination is similar to an enterprise agreement, but the terms and conditions have been determined by the Fair Work Commission.

Work Choices Agreement: agreements that were approved by the Workplace Authority.

  • Agreement (61348)
  • General Document (15554)
  • Single-enterprise Agreement (11430)
  • Greenfields Agreement (938)
  • Multi-enterprise Agreement (55)
  • Decision (34)
  • Agreements (approved) (21)

Information

Can't find what you are looking for?

Try our search tips. Click the question mark at the top of this page.

Is a document missing?

Some materials may not yet be available, if there is a document missing, please provide us the details in our Document Request Form and we will email it to you.

What's new in Document Search?

After our new Document Search launch on 9 February 2026, we continue to closely monitor performance and appreciate your feedback as this helps us to improve the search experience we provide.
Document Search Feedback

Looking for more information?

For general information and forms, please visit the Fair Work Commission website.

Search

Helpful hints for Document Search

Phrase Search - " "
Using quotation marks returns results containing exact words. Example: "small business employer"
Search Operator - AND
Shows results with both terms. Example: "s.185" AND 14 days
Search Operator - OR
Returns results with either term. Example: "constructive dismissal" OR forced to resign
Search Operator - NOT
Returns results with former but not latter. Example: "minimum employment period" NOT 12 months
Proximity Search - ~
Returns results where words are within N words of each other. Example: continuous period~20
Wildcard Search - *
Represents any characters. Example: industr*

Combined Example

s.739 AND "Berri" Golden Cockerel~40 AND schedule AND ambig* NOT("variation" OR "217")

Documents currently available

The Document Management System provides access to the following types of documents:

  • Decisions and Orders
  • Modern Awards
  • Enterprise Agreements
  • Regulated Labour Hire Arrangement Orders (RLHAO)
  • Full Bench Proceedings
  • Research Materials

New documents are added regularly as they are published. If you cannot find a specific document, please use the Document Request Form.
